text:
NAME: EYE_VSN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: EYE_VSN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
152W00000X: Optometrist 
152WC0802X: Optometrist — corneal and contact management 
152WL0500X: Optometrist — low vision rehabilitation 
152WX0102X: Optometrist — occupational vision 
152WP0200X: Optometrist —
